positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for johns_car_positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    johns_car != solo_ev).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~tesla_model_3(johns_car)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~one_seater(X0) | ~transport_multiple(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~single_seat_electric(X0) | one_seater(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    transport_multiple(tesla_model_3)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    tesla_model_3 != solo_ev).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    tesla_model_3 != johns_car).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define solo_ev(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
